items.title: The harrowing dark side of England's World Cup exit
items.summary: During a major football tournament such as the World Cup, some women and girls are constantly living in fear - because domestic abuse rises when England play, research shows.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Garry Sobers dies, aged 89
items.summary: Former West Indies allrounder passed away at his home in Barbados
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: 64-team FIFA World Cup could help India qualify, says former captain
items.summary: FIFA is considering increasing the number of teams in the 2030 World Cup from 48, which featured in the 2026 edition, to 64. The proposal was officially put forward by South Ame...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
